title: Roziaria
description: Built around the Create mod and its addons, with 70+ new biomes, new structures and Fresh Animations, while staying mostly lag free! Now with Create Aeronautics.
body:
Roziaria amps up your experience with Create at its core. Enjoy smooth, fluid animations and interactive particle effects as you explore biomes rich with lush foliage, all finely tuned for smooth gameplay. ---- **What to expect:** - Enhanced animations - Unique world generation - 70+ new biomes - More building and decoration options - Losing track of time **Planned updates:** - Backpacks (soon) - End Overhaul

Feel free to suggest changes/additions via the [GitHub](https://github.com/cydonik/Roziaria/issues) issues tab.
_This pack is still in development, so expect significant changes and additions in the future._
